IQ-TREE License
================

Tool Name: IQ-TREE (Efficient phylogenetic software by maximum likelihood)
License Type: GNU General Public License v2.0 (GPL v2)
Copyright Holder: Bui Quang Minh, Nguyen Lam Tung, Olga Chernomor, et al.
Official Website: http://www.iqtree.org/

GNU GPL v2 License Summary
-------------------------

IQ-TREE is released under the GNU General Public License v2.0. This is a copyleft license that ensures all users have the freedom to use, modify, and distribute the software while requiring derivative works to use the same license.

Usage Conditions
----------------

You have the right to:
1. Freely run the program for any purpose
2. Freely study how the program works and modify it
3. Freely redistribute copies
4. Freely distribute modified versions

Obligations and Restrictions
----------------------------

If you distribute software based on IQ-TREE (including modified versions), you must:
1. Prominently publish appropriate copyright notices in each copy
2. Preserve all license and warranty disclaimer statements
3. Provide recipients with the complete GPL v2 license
4. If you modify the program, attach prominent notices stating the changes

GPL Copyleft
-----------

IQ-TREE uses GPL v2 license, which means:
- Any derivative work containing IQ-TREE code must also use GPL v2 license
- You cannot integrate IQ-TREE into proprietary software
- When distributing software based on IQ-TREE, you must provide source code

Citation Information
--------------------

When using IQ-TREE in academic research, please cite the following literature:

Nguyen LT, Schmidt HA, von Haeseler A, Minh BQ. (2015)
"IQ-TREE: a fast and effective stochastic algorithm for estimating maximum-likelihood phylogenies."
Mol Biol Evol 32(1):268-274.

And the model selection method:

Kalyaanamoorthy S, Minh BQ, Wong TKF, von Haeseler A, Jermin LS. (2017)
"ModelFinder: fast model selection for accurate phylogenetic estimates."
Nat Methods 14(6):587-589.

Technical Notes
---------------

IQ-TREE is an efficient and accurate phylogenetic analysis software with main features:
- Maximum likelihood phylogenetic tree inference
- Fast model selection (ModelFinder)
- Ultra-fast bootstrap support (UFBoot2)
- Support for DNA, protein, and codon data
- Support for partition and mixture models
- Support for large-scale dataset analysis

Disclaimer
----------

This program is provided "as is" without any express or implied warranty. To the extent permitted by applicable law, the authors assume no liability for any issues with the program.

For the complete GPL v2 license text, please visit:
https://www.gnu.org/licenses/old-licenses/gpl-2.0.html
